name: Nachi-Fujikoshi Corp.
summary: Nachi-Fujikoshi Corp. operates as a machinery manufacturer in Japan, rest of Asia, the Americas, and Europe. It provides cutting tools, including drills, taps, end mills, gear cutters, broaches, and cut-off and re-grinding tools; and machine tools, such as broaching machines, precision roll forming machines, grinding machines, machining cells, and power finishers, as well as skiving machining center for gears. The company also offers robots for spot and arc welding, handling, palletizing, heavy duty, cleanroom, and option, as well as controllers and support services; and radial ball, radial roller, thrust ball, and thrust roller bearings, as well as bearing units and plummer block housings. In addition, it provides hydraulic equipment comprising valves, pumps, motors, units, and rotary center joints; special steels consisting of high speed tool and alloy tool steels, bearing and martensitic stainless steels, cermet, and micron hard products; and industrial furnaces, including vacuum carburizing furnace, and vacuum degreasing machine and system, as well as coating equipment and services. Further, the company offers forming tools, cutting saws, machining systems, and automotive hydraulics. Additionally, it provides engineering services for regrinding and recoating of tools, robots, machining equipment, heat treatment equipment, bearings, hydraulic equipment, and special steels. The company serves customers in the automotive, machinery and retail, energy, and infrastructure markets. Nachi-Fujikoshi Corp. was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
